pi_items.source: verifier.py explicit usage for element name matching
verifier.py explicit usage as threshold for point preservation

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world GPX data representing a 124km track from Dole to Champigny-lès-Langres, France. The target output path C:\\workspace\\output\\zeroed_survey.gpx, expected track name Zeroed_Survey, and a minimum point preservation threshold of 1100 track points are all explicitly enforced by the verifier logic.
